attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.ENTITY_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.PROCESS_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_1, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_2, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_3, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_4, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_1, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_2, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_3, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_4, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_1, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_2, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_3, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_4, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.ON_HOLD_FLAG, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_SOURCE_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_VALID_FLAG, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.TRANSACTION_DATE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.BUDGETARY_CONTROL_FLAG, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.MERGE_EVENT_SET_ID, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS,
 (
 select  EVENT_ID ,APPLICATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS
 minus
 select  EVENT_ID ,APPLICATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XLA_EVENTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.EVENT_ID = STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_ID and ACM.APPLICATION_ID=STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.APPLICATION_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XLA_EVENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XLA_EVENTS)
